contents:
(** Demonstrate the [HProp] is a (bounded) lattice w.r.t. the logical
operations. This requires Univalence. *)
Definition hand (X Y : HProp) : HProp := Build_HProp (X * Y).
(* We use this notation because [hor] can accept arguments of type [Type], which leads to minor confusion in the instances below *)
(* This tactic attempts to destruct a truncated sum (disjunction) *)

Local Ltac hor_intros :=
    let x := fresh in
    intro x; repeat (strip_truncations; destruct x as [x | x]).

goals.conclusion: Commutative ((fun P Q : HProp => hor P Q) : HProp -> HProp -> HProp)
Commutative ((fun P Q : HProp => hor P Q) : HProp -> HProp -> HProp)
hor x y = hor y x

contents: apply path_iff_hprop; hor_intros; apply tr; auto.

goals.conclusion: hand x y = hand y x
hand x y <~> hand y x
Associative ((fun P Q : HProp => hor P Q) : HProp -> HProp -> HProp)
Associative ((fun P Q : HProp => hor P Q) : HProp -> HProp -> HProp)
hor x (hor y z) = hor (hor x y) z
hand x (hand y z) = hand (hand x y) z
hand x (hand y z) <~> hand (hand x y) z
BinaryIdempotent ((fun P Q : HProp => hor P Q) : HProp -> HProp -> HProp)
BinaryIdempotent ((fun P Q : HProp => hor P Q) : HProp -> HProp -> HProp)
Idempotent (fun P Q : HProp => hor P Q) x

LeftIdentity ((fun P Q : HProp => hor P Q) : HProp -> HProp -> HProp)
  False_hp

LeftIdentity ((fun P Q : HProp => hor P Q) : HProp -> HProp -> HProp)
  False_hp

contents: apply path_iff_hprop; hor_intros; try contradiction || assumption.

goals.conclusion:
RightIdentity ((fun P Q : HProp => hor P Q) : HProp -> HProp -> HProp)
  False_hp

RightIdentity ((fun P Q : HProp => hor P Q) : HProp -> HProp -> HProp)
  False_hp

contents: apply path_iff_hprop; hor_intros; try contradiction || assumption.

goals.conclusion: Absorption ((fun P Q : HProp => hor P Q) : HProp -> HProp -> HProp) hand
Absorption ((fun P Q : HProp => hor P Q) : HProp -> HProp -> HProp) hand
Absorption hand ((fun P Q : HProp => hor P Q) : HProp -> HProp -> HProp)
Absorption hand ((fun P Q : HProp => hor P Q) : HProp -> HProp -> HProp)
